type DeploymentStackDenySettings = class interface IJsonModel<DeploymentStackDenySettings> interface IPersistableModel<DeploymentStackDenySettings>

Docs.summary: Defines how resources deployed by the Deployment stack are locked.

MemberSignature.Value: public DeploymentStackDenySettings (Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackDenySettingsMode mode);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackDenySettingsMode mode) cil managed

Docs.param: denySettings Mode that defines denied actions.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? ApplyToChildScopes { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> ApplyToChildScopes
Public Property ApplyToChildScopes As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.ApplyToChildScopes : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: DenySettings will be applied to child resource scopes of every managed resource with a deny assignment.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<string> ExcludedActions { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<string> ExcludedActions
Public ReadOnly Property ExcludedActions As IList(Of String)
member this.ExcludedActions : System.Collections.Generic.IList<string>

Docs.summary: List of role-based management operations that are excluded from the denySettings. Up to 200 actions are permitted. If the denySetting mode is set to 'denyWriteAndDelete', then the following actions are automatically appended to 'excludedActions': '*\/read' and 'Microsoft.Authorization/locks/delete'. If the denySetting mode is set to 'denyDelete', then the following actions are automatically appended to 'excludedActions': 'Microsoft.Authorization/locks/delete'. Duplicate actions will be removed.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<string> ExcludedPrincipals { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<string> ExcludedPrincipals
Public ReadOnly Property ExcludedPrincipals As IList(Of String)
member this.ExcludedPrincipals : System.Collections.Generic.IList<string>

Docs.summary: List of AAD principal IDs excluded from the lock. Up to 5 principals are permitted.
